test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_uniform (a UInt64, v Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE test_skew (a UInt64, v Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE test_mega (a UInt64, v Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_uniform SELECT number AS a, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(20000000)
INSERT INTO test_skew SELECT if(number % 10 < 9, 0, number % 200000) AS a, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(20000000)
INSERT INTO test_mega SELECT number % 3 AS a, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(20000000)
test.query: SELECT a, count(), sum(v) FROM test_uniform GROUP BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a, count(), sum(v) FROM test_skew GROUP BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a, uniqExact(v) FROM test_skew GROUP BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a, count(), sum(v) FROM test_mega GROUP BY a FORMAT Null
